productDisplayName: Nike Men Waffle Racer II Red Sports Shoes
description: The nike Waffle Racer II is a running shoe that does not compromise on style. It is designed to perform well on all terrains, even while on a dirt track. nike keeps the shoe lightweight without indulging in excessive overlays. This shoe pays tribute to the traditional Nike styles. Equipped with the famous waffle sole, this shoe ensures optimal performance for every runner.UpperFabric upper with stitch detailing for good shoe structureReinforced leather overlay on the toe box for shock free comfortNike swoosh overlay on the midfoot in synthetic leatherCentral lacing systemPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticReinforced overlay on the heel collar for additional support to the ankleLow ankle cut for breathabilityMidsoleFull length, sculpted Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU waffle sole reinforced onto the upper on the forefoot regionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
